topics.title: Lottery Winner Interview
topics.summary: The studio hosts a conversation regarding the recent lottery win of a local mail room worker who won $1 million on a scratch-off ticket.

topics.title: Lottery Winner's Strategy
topics.summary: The studio discusses a listener who won a million dollars in the lottery and chose a long-term payout over a lump sum to ensure financial stability.

topics.title: Eric the Midget and American Idol Plans
topics.summary: The studio discusses a failed plan to bring Eric the Midget to an American Idol finale after his handler became unavailable, leading to a critique of his reliability as a guest.

topics.title: Eric Demidget and Brandy Taylor Phone Call
topics.summary: The studio facilitates a phone call between Eric Demidget and adult film star Brandy Taylor while the hosts mock Eric's behavior and discuss his personal finances.

topics.title: Brandy Taylor Phone Sex Segment
topics.summary: The studio features a phone sex segment where a listener named Eric attempts to engage in a sexual fantasy with Brandy Taylor while the hosts mock his lack of experience.

topics.title: Mother's Sexual History with Other Men
topics.summary: The studio features a producer who brings his mother onto the air to discuss her history of engaging in sexual acts with other men while her husband watched.

topics.title: Roxanne and Jason's Sexual Dynamics
topics.summary: The show features a mother and son discussing her past sexual experiences, her participation in group sex with other men, and potential sexual encounters with coworkers.

topics.title: Roxanne's Striptease and Guest Appearances
topics.summary: The show features a woman named Roxanne who exposes her breasts on air while interacting with the hosts, followed by an interview with musician Steven Van Zandt.

topics.title: The Evolution of Modern Music Promotion
topics.summary: The studio explores the shifting landscape of the music industry, discussing how artists like Bruce Springsteen navigate modern marketing tools such as American Idol and the decline of traditional radio.

topics.title: Stephen Van Zandt and the CBGB Legacy
topics.summary: The studio explores Stephen Van Zandt's new tribute album for CBGB, his experiences on The Sopranos, and his perspectives on rock icons like Bruce Springsteen.

topics.title: American Idol and Transsexual Contest Discussion
topics.summary: The studio explores rumors of a fixed American Idol season while discussing the criteria for an upcoming transsexual contest and the inclusion of pre-operative participants.

topics.title: Pop Culture and Personal Anecdotes
topics.summary: The studio explores topics ranging from the logistics of filming sex tapes and the spoilers for The Sopranos to a listener's commentary on Howard's appearance in an old costume.

topics.title: Limo Problems and Celebrity Comparisons
topics.summary: The studio discusses a malfunctioning limousine heater involving a petcock valve, internal staff interactions with interns, and various pop culture comparisons from Maxim magazine.

topics.title: Pop Culture and Current Events Debate
topics.summary: The studio features a series of rapid-fire comparisons involving sports figures, true crime cases, comedy icons, and a discussion regarding immigration policy and celebrity news.

topics.title: Current Events and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio covers a variety of topics including immigration policy, political commentary on the presidency, the release of Ronald Reagan's diaries, celebrity news regarding Angelina Jolie and Britney Spears, and upcoming comedy tour dates.
